rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Place assumptions and guarantees in the correct scope: component type for port references, implementation for subcomponent bindings
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and implication for clear contract expressions
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
Branching logic should use nested if-then-else
Use AGREE logical operators for clear contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use existing visible identifiers
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
